servers.name: ClinicalTrials.gov MCP (x402)
servers.description: Pay-per-call x402 MCP for ClinicalTrials.gov v2: trials/search ($0.05), trials/by_nct ($0.05), sponsors/pipeline ($0.07). Live on Cloudflare Workers. No signup, no API key — pay USDC on Base.

authentication.credentials: Pay-per-call via x402 USDC on Base — no signup, no API key. Each call returns 402 with an EXACT-scheme requirement; agents pay 0x1664530DC2A1CA350B1dbaD1Fc1F1a70c90fe4de in Base USDC and retry with X-PAYMENT.

tools.name: /v1/trials/search
tools.description: Search ClinicalTrials.gov v2 by free-text q, phase, and overall status. Flat rows. $0.05.

tools.name: /v1/trials/by_nct
tools.description: Fetch the full ClinicalTrials.gov record for a single NCT id (eligibility, outcomes, locations, sponsors). $0.05.

tools.name: /v1/sponsors/pipeline
tools.description: Aggregate a lead sponsor's clinical-trial pipeline (phase + status histograms + flat rows). $0.07.
